content.full_text:
July 24, 1992

Mr. Scott Hallabrin
Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street, Suite 600
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dennis C. Scherzer
2261 Clarke Avenue
East Palo Alto, CA 94303
res 415 323-0334
off 510 659-9751

Dear Mr. Hallabrin:

I am a directly elected public official serving on the Board of Directors of the East Palo Alto Sanitary District (EPASD). EPASD is an enterprise special district, politically autonomous from the city of East Palo Alto. EPASD serves approximately 60% of the city of East Palo Alto and a small portion of the city Menlo Park.

I want to run for election to the City Council of East Palo Alto. Can I serve on both the EPASD Board of Directors and the City Council?

I realize that some matters may require that I refrain from voting in either capacity (councilperson or director), and that the best protocol under some circumstances may be to absent myself completely from some items that may place me into some form of conflict of interest. These situations, however, would be exceptional and few.

August 7 is the filing deadline for City Council. It would be of great assistance to me if you could render a prompt reply to my inquiry. Thank you for your time and consideration.

Sincerely,

[signature]

Dennis C. Scherzer
